text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Light as a feather, as if I have wings, in fact. I
believe a fine performance is in store.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course, my feet shall remain firmly on the
ground. I shall advance calmly, surely, and
elegantly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I do happen to be a Mejiro, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, I shall be on my way. ♪
